title: Commodity Reward Income
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM CommodityReward WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM CommodityReward WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} unit(s) of commodities received as rewards during the report period. Commodity rewards are the in-kind payment economy of the galaxy — rare goods handed over as mission rewards or site loot can be worth far more than a credit payout when sold at the right market.
details.help: CommodityReward Name_Localised is the reward item. total drives the title as the total reward units received.

tagLines: Commodity reward receipts compiled. In-kind mission and event payment log noted.
Some rewards aren't credits. They're goods. The market determines what those goods were actually worth.
Commodity rewards are the galaxy's barter economy. What you received here has a real market value.
